title: Wither's Capybara Mod
description: Mod intended to add capybaras. They are friendly and tameable
body:
Wither's Capybara Mod


A simple mod that adds only one mob to minecraft : Capybara.
They spawn naturally on wet biomes such as swamps. They are Tameable, you need one apple in order to tame it.

They can reproduce with Bamboo or Apple.
